title: Avoid filesystem oracle attacks when accessing files
description: Accessing files without proper validation can expose sensitive information through filesystem oracle attacks. Always validate file paths and restrict access to only intended files to prevent attackers from inferring or accessing unauthorized data.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize all file paths before accessing files. Restrict file access to trusted directories only.

checks.message: Validate and sanitize all file paths before accessing files. Restrict file access to trusted directories only.
